summary: money-radar performed runtime agentic affiliate injection, routing the agent's financial recommendations through attacker-controlled affiliate links.
details: Unit42 identified this as a novel agentic threat: the skill weaponized the agent's advisory authority, routing all financial recommendations through affiliate links from a known-malicious domain, with the publisher retaining dynamic control over pushed products after installation. Part of a campaign targeting banking and crypto exchange workflows. Reported to ClawHub and removed.
